items.headline: London open — liquidity patch; avoid fading the first impulse without size plan
NY session — index correlation risk; trim correlated FX legs into cash prints
Asia range — mean reversion works until London sweep; watch false breaks on yen pairs
CPI week — reduce size pre-release; widen stops only if your rulebook allows
Overlap window — highest flow; pay up on slippage or scale entries in slices
FOMC / major risk — flat or hedged beats hero trades; protect mental capital first
Friday close — weekend gap risk; consider flat micros or reduce carry into Sunday
